location.indexParagraph1: Located in the heart of Bermondsey, SE1 London, Sara Monsé Beauty is a family-led home-based salon with over 18 years of experience in the beauty industry. We specialise in bespoke facials, relaxing massages, expert nail treatments, and specialist skin and wellness injections.
location.indexParagraph2: Combining professional expertise with a warm, welcoming atmosphere, our mission is to create a sanctuary where clients across Bermondsey and surrounding London areas can unwind, renew, and feel truly cared for.
location.coverTagline: Bespoke beauty in the heart of Bermondsey — care, artistry, and renewal.
